summary: Delivered consolidated Testing Guidelines to the code-generation skill. Added Consolidation Discipline section to prevent multi-cycle artifact proliferation. The update emphasizes in-place fixes for existing correct artifacts rather than creating new versions, breaking infinite remediation loops.
suggestions: Review the Consolidation Discipline section with the team before PR merge
Ensure similar consolidation rules are added to other skills if needed
Monitor artifact creation patterns after this change for any remaining proliferation
delivery_notes: This skill improvement addresses the core issue of artifact bloat in QA remediation workflows. The consolidation discipline ensures that when existing correct artifacts exist, they are fixed in-place rather than duplicated. This change should significantly reduce multi-cycle artifact proliferation in the code-generation skill's testing guidelines.
